title: The First Sunday
summary: Stacey and Giselle open the first Sunday Brunch with French Silk Pie, the too-rich bribe that quietly became the whole table. Phaedra explains the silk, Tiana celebrates the first bite, and Havok files substitution intel.
objective: Introduce Stacey, Giselle, and the supporting Shelties; establish the Sunday Brunch format; and anchor the pilot to accepted REC-001 French Silk Pie.
emotionalThread: The warmth and mild chaos of the first brunch together — the too-rich pie becoming a welcome mat for people who have been told they are too much.
primaryComicEngine: Giselle's exacting standards against Stacey's box-crust confession, with Phaedra's precision, Tiana's delight, and Havok's cheerful overconfidence orbiting the pie.
